creator: doconnor@gsoft.com.au
text:
On Tue, 26 Feb 2008, Tim Kientzle wrote:
> Can you reproduce it with the very first files in a large
> archive?
>
> If so, could you possibly send me the first portion
> of such an archive so that I could reproduce it here?

OK, I will send it to you separately. It has some marginally sensitive
information but in any case stuffing the PR DB full of crap is
impolite ;)

> > gtar -b 128 -zxvf /dev/nsa0 /foo/bar
> > Whereas using bsdtar does not - it matches no files.
>
> What files did gtar match?  Could you please send
> me the output of

[cain 22:40] ~ >gtar -b 128 -ztvf /dev/nsa0 /usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_statistics
gtar: Removing leading `/' from member names
-rw-r--r-- doconnor/users 187163 2008-02-19 08:25 /usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_statistics
gtar: Ignoring unknown extended header keyword `SCHILY.dev'
gtar: Ignoring unknown extended header keyword `SCHILY.ino'
gtar: Ignoring unknown extended header keyword `SCHILY.nlink'

gzip: stdin: decompression OK, trailing garbage ignored
gtar: Child returned status 2
gtar: Error exit delayed from previous errors

Whereas tar returns nothing
[cain 22:42] ~ >tar -b 128 -ztvf /dev/nsa0 /usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_statistics
[cain 22:42] ~ >echo $?
0

[cain 22:43] ~ >tar -b 128 -ztvf /dev/nsa0 | less
tar: Removing leading '/' from member names
drwxrwxr-x  0 root   users       0 Feb 19 08:25 usr/local/Genesis/Admin
drwxrwxr-x  0 bfuller users       0 Feb  5 16:52 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/GS Admin
drwxrwxr-x  0 doconnor users       0 Feb 19 18:42 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/Templates
drwxrwxr-x  0 mhampton users       0 Dec 29  2004 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/BMF
drwxrwxr-x  0 amurphy  users       0 Sep 10 16:28 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/GS Radar
-rw-r--r--  0 doconnor users  187163 Feb 19 08:25 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_statistics
-rw-r--r--  0 doconnor users  262144 Feb 19 08:25 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_turbo
<snip>

>    gtar -b 128 -ztvf /dev/nsa0 /foo/bar

See above.

> Any additional information would help.

I snipped 250k off the beginning of the archive with..
[cain 22:44] ~ >dd if=/dev/nsa0 of=test.dat bs=64k count=4
4+0 records in
4+0 records out
262144 bytes transferred in 0.041679 secs (6289609 bytes/sec)

and now I get..
[cain 22:45] ~ >tar ztvf test.dat
tar: Removing leading '/' from member names
drwxrwxr-x  0 root   users       0 Feb 19 08:25 usr/local/Genesis/Admin
drwxrwxr-x  0 bfuller users       0 Feb  5 16:52 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/GS Admin
drwxrwxr-x  0 doconnor users       0 Feb 19 18:42 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/Templates
drwxrwxr-x  0 mhampton users       0 Dec 29  2004 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/BMF
drwxrwxr-x  0 amurphy  users       0 Sep 10 16:28 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/GS Radar
-rw-r--r--  0 doconnor users  187163 Feb 19 08:25 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_statistics
-rw-r--r--  0 doconnor users  262144 Feb 19 08:25 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_turbo
-rw-r--r--  0 doconnor users 1052558 Feb 19 08:25 usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_filenames
tar: Premature end of gzip compressed data: Input/output error
[cain 22:45] ~ >tar -b 128 -ztvf test.dat /usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_statistics
tar: Premature end of gzip compressed data: Input/output error
[cain 22:45] ~ >gtar -b 128 -ztvf test.dat /usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_statistics
gtar: Removing leading `/' from member names
-rw-r--r-- doconnor/users 187163 2008-02-19 08:25 /usr/local/Genesis/Admin/.glimpse_statistics

gzip: stdin: unexpected end of file
gtar: Unexpected EOF in archive
gtar: Error is not recoverable: exiting now

Thanks for looking into it.

-- 
Daniel O'Connor software and network engineer
for Genesis Software - http://www.gsoft.com.au
"The nice thing about standards is that there
are so many of them to choose from."
  -- Andrew Tanenbaum
GPG Fingerprint - 5596 B766 97C0 0E94 4347 295E E593 DC20 7B3F CE8C
